message:
chore(deps): bump memchr to 2.7.6

Update memchr dependency from version 2 (minimum) to explicit 2.7.6
for ftui-render crate.

This is a minor version bump within the same major version with no
breaking changes. The update was performed as part of a broader
dependency audit to ensure all dependencies are at recent stable
versions.

Note: Pre-existing snapshot test mismatches in ftui-demo-showcase are
unrelated to this change and existed prior to this update.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
